ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Oct-25-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Freedman appeared by zoom for Kristy Nordahl (petitioner/objector).
Liza de Vries and Mary Symons appeared by zoom for and with Herb Thomas (proposed successor trustee) and for and with Barry Sacks (current trustee).
Reynolds Cafferata appeared by zoom for University California Berkeley Foundation (beneficiary).

Mr. Freedman stated that the case settled last night, that the settlement agreement resulted in the settlement of Kristy's 850 petition for conveyance of property and that Kristy's petition will be dismissed once the terms of the settlement are performed. Mr. Freedman also stated that the settlement agreement also settled the petition for the appointment of Debra Dolch which will be taken off calendar, that they have agreed to the appointment of Herb Thomas, that they will withdraw their objections and that they prefer venue to be in Contra Costa County. Mr. Cafferata stated that he agrees with what Mr. Freedman stated and that the university is fine with the accounting that was submitted by Mr. Sacks. Ms. de Vries clarified that the agreement was to withdraw the petition for the appointment of Ms. Dolch, rather than take it off calendar. Ms. Sacks spoke of his health issues and expressed that it would be best to have a professional trustee in place. The First Amended Petition for Conveyance of Personal Property, etc., and the Petition for Appointment of Debra Dolch as Successor Trustee are off calendar. The First and Final Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: S. Park. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jul-07-2021 Continued To Aug-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mary Symons, via ZOOM, for Barry Sacks, via ZOOM, Trustee; Michael Freedman, via ZOOM, for Kristy Nordahl, Petitioner; Liza DeVries, via ZOOM, for Herb Thomas, Successor Trustee; Reynolds Cafferata, via ZOOM, for U.C. Berkeley Foundation, Objector; Jamie Wells, via ZOOM, for Merrill Lynch, Other.

The court at the outset requests an update from counsel regarding the status of his matter. Mr. Freedman reports that some discovery has been completed but additional discovery is pending. Mr. Freedman also reports that the parties have discussed in possibly scheduling private mediation later in the Fall of this year. Mr. Cafferata confirms Mr. Fredman's testimony. The court advises counsel that both matters on today's calendar will be continued. Ms. Symons objects to the court continuing the Accounting Petition as it is her position that it should be heard today and provides oral argument in support of her position.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is continued to August 4, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Petition for Conveyance of Personal Property to Petitioner, etc., is continued to October 13, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.
